questions.question: Explain the key differences between the chalk and talk method and PowerPoint presentation in terms of student engagement. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Consider the role of visual aids and note-taking in each method

questions.question: A lecturer uses the chalk and talk method to deliver a 1-hour lecture. If the lecturer maintains a steady pace, each student will hear approximately 90 seconds of content. If the lecturer uses PowerPoint presentations, each slide will be displayed for 30 seconds. What is the main advantage of using PowerPoint presentations in this scenario? (10 marks)
questions.hint: Consider the role of visual aids in aiding comprehension and note-taking

questions.question: A student attends a lecture using PowerPoint presentations and finds it difficult to follow the lecturer's notes. Which teaching method do you think would be more effective in this scenario, and why? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Consider the importance of note-taking and active participation in learning
